message:
test(cx): add proptest security properties and E2E tests for Macaroons (bd-2lqyk.4)

Add comprehensive test suite:
- Proptest predicate serialization roundtrip (10000 cases)
- Proptest token binary roundtrip (5000 cases)
- Proptest no-caveat-removal property (5000 cases)
- Proptest no-forgery property (5000 cases)
- Proptest monotonic attenuation (2000 cases)
- Tampered signature/caveat rejection
- E2E full delegation chain (6 caveats, 5 failure modes)
- E2E third-party delegation chain with discharge binding
- Verification error Display coverage

61 macaroon tests pass including 27000+ proptest cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
